creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Conrad,

Awaiting responses on the mailing-list https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2018-August/114105.html

Don't want to kick other people in the shins :D Assume 1.1.1 will be available in some way in ports soon. Did you check if the openssl-master port from my private WIP repo is usable for you?

Cheers, Bernard.
